summary: Dashboard shows proper authenticated UI layout with usage metrics, billing estimate, and navigation. However, critical brand palette violations exist - the interface uses generic neutral colors instead of the required diner aesthetic palette, and the pink CTA button treatment is missing.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI defaults instead of required diner palette surfaces - should use teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea primary canvases, not generic white/gray backgrounds
Primary CTA button 'Resend verification email' uses generic styling instead of required diner pink CTA treatment from .diner-button (#ffb3c7 with hard shadow)
Logged-in dashboard surface shows visual divergence from public brand treatment, creating brand discontinuity after login as described in postmortem

actions: Apply diner palette to dashboard - use teal or cream backgrounds instead of neutral whites/grays
Convert 'Resend verification email' button to use .diner-button pink treatment
Ensure authenticated UI maintains brand coherence with public marketing surfaces
